# Spec: fixture-coverage-match (verify-tools test fixture)

## Purpose

Minimal fixture spec used by verify-tools coverage cross-check tests
(R2.S1 / AC3). Not a real feature.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] AC1 → R1.S1 [auto] — sample automatic criterion one.
- [ ] AC2 → R1.S2 [manual] — sample manual criterion two.
